channel.title: Multiply Local — Marketing Tips for Local Businesses
channel.description: Practical local SEO, web design, and business automation advice for service businesses in Lake Charles and beyond.
channel.copyright: Amplify Marketing SEO LLC (operating as Multiply Local)

item.title: How We Got Bayou Mortgage 20 Google Reviews in 3 Days
item.description: A real, repeatable case study: how we helped Bayou Mortgage land 20 five-star Google reviews in just 72 hours using a simple text-based review system — no incentives, no gimmicks, no review-gating. Steal the exact playbook for your own business. 👉 multiplylocal.com/book

item.title: 5 Things Your Website Needs If You Run a Business in Lake Charles
item.description: Most business owners in Lake Charles have a website. The problem? Most of those websites aren't doing anything. Here are the five things every Lake Charles business website needs to actually work. 👉 multiplylocal.com/book

item.title: Why 90% of Local Contractors Are Invisible on Google (And How to Fix It)
item.description: Most local service businesses have the same problem: great work, solid word-of-mouth — but when someone searches Google for what they offer, they're nowhere to be found. Here's what's actually going on and exactly how to change it. 👉 multiplylocal.com/book

item.title: 5 Things Your Website Is Costing You Right Now
item.description: A slow, template-built, or mobile-broken website isn't just embarrassing — it's actively sending your customers to a competitor. Here are the five most expensive mistakes we see on local business sites. 👉 multiplylocal.com/book

item.title: The Google Business Profile Checklist for Home Service Companies
item.description: Your Google Business Profile is your most powerful free marketing tool — and most businesses are leaving 80% of it on the table. This checklist covers every field that actually moves the needle. 👉 multiplylocal.com/book

item.title: How to Rank #1 in the Google Map Pack Without Paying for Ads
item.description: The map pack — those three business listings that appear above organic results — gets the majority of local clicks. Here's the exact strategy we use to rank local businesses there organically. 👉 multiplylocal.com/book

item.title: Why Most HVAC Companies Get Zero Leads From Their Website
item.description: Having a website and having a website that generates leads are two completely different things. We break down the conversion gaps we see most often — and how to close them without rebuilding from scratch. 👉 multiplylocal.com/book

item.title: Mobile-First Web Design: What It Means and Why It Matters for Local Businesses
item.description: 72% of local service searches happen on mobile. If your site isn't built for a phone first, you're losing more than half your potential customers before they ever read your headline. 👉 multiplylocal.com/book
